2026-04-09T01:05:18.4859861Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-09T01:05:18.4860366Z 
2026-04-09T01:05:18.4860700Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-09T01:05:18.4861462Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-09T01:05:18.4861933Z 
2026-04-09T01:05:18.4862121Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-09T01:05:18.4862435Z

2026-04-09T01:05:18.4862901Z
